* Load values from the default translation and include them into comments of the files generated by Generator
* Make SeparatorChar and ResolveFileRefs configurable via configuration files
* Make a config file optional (pick settings from a translation project instead)
* Load and use CLDR data ( https://cldr.unicode.org/ )
* In `Plural` placeholders, add support for internationalized options (one, few, many...). This is related to CLDR above.
* A version of the library for other languages and frameworks (JavaScript, Python?)
